authorized_by: Jesse 2026-07-09: Opus authorised to EXECUTE routine right-size/freeze while Fable is out of quota; advisor RIGHT-SIZED frozen design supplied; f2b-replicate is NOT GNG-0-signed and has NO final-phase run (P-9 cutoff not crossed), so a reset-correct-refreeze is lawful
changes: DESIGN right-size (advisor): per_arm_items 1000 -> 250 (deterministic rank-prefix of the pinned d-qa-r covered set; no corpus re-pin, freshness+disjointness preserved by construction); seeds [0,1,2,3,4] -> [0,1,2]; retry_sweep [1,2,4] -> [4] (a single FIXED pre-registered k=4 — the pinned analysis best-k select over a singleton is a no-op, so NO in-bootstrap k selection occurs); prm best-of-N 2 -> 4; GPU A10G -> single A100-40GB.

ARM DROP: gold-oracle-retry removed from the arm set (advisor DROP list). The runner no longer emits gold cells; the pinned analysis resolves its (unreferenced) gold fields to null and no verdict rule references them; independent_vars arm levels, arms_mandatory_baselines and the sec-gold-oracle-gap endpoint were removed from the record.

poc/f2b/runner/f2b_runner.py (sha af527206c9573c6e7c5dd5380d8123ffbd96c720af13cdd1c5ae2017f3ce0018 -> new staged bytes): honour per_arm_items via a deterministic rank-prefix subset; use that subset for the store-bytes ledger; drop the gold-oracle cell loop; add A100 to gpu-class choices / CELL_TIMEOUT_S_DEFAULT / dry_plan inventory; dry_plan tokens + eval-set print reflect the 250 subset. RETRIES REMAIN R1-ONLY (unchanged; verified above). The shuffled-verifier permutation still spans the FULL covered-concept set (index_labels restricts scoring to the subset) so external-slice queries never KeyError.

poc/f2b/inputs/f2b-manifest.json: design_constants seeds/retry_sweep/per_arm_items; arm_plan.prm_best_of_n 2->4; planning throughput + flop_accounting usd_per_hour gain an A100 row; gold_oracle_note + dropped_arms_note + d-qa-r inputs_status updated.
poc/modal/modal_f2b.py: add A100 (A100-40GB) function + GPU_CHOICES; add a LOCAL --dry-plan passthrough (runs the runner dry-plan, no container, $0).
poc/f2b/smoke/check_mock.py: EXPECTED_ARMS drops gold-oracle; gold assertions replaced by a gold-absent assertion; safety-bounds section no longer expects gold cells.

analysis/f2b_replicate.py: UNCHANGED (sha 711ac322573be939a03f60aa39ef9bb05b775336c6474d634e43ed20f57e8426). With only k=4 cells present, best-k selection is a no-op = fixed k=4; with the gold arm absent, gold fields resolve to null (diagnostic, never verdict-bearing).

pins.harness_manifest 186a20f85207cd72f9bef586010dfb28e314a12ed96149cf1298bfd2a3e56f98 -> cffd61049bd6f6a08adf1dbe6ee3a2aa7dd3d032c630de10060edfbca5431d9c (staged-bytes manifest sha, recomputed by poc/modal/modal_f2b.py's own manifest code).
documented_conservative_deviations: seed-sign secondary: the pinned analysis rule is >= ceil(0.8 * n_seeds); at 3 seeds that is 3/3, STRICTER than the advisor 2/3 floor. It is a reported-only secondary that does NOT gate the PASS, so the stricter reading is conservative and harmless; the analysis code was left unchanged to keep its pinned sha and hand-computed selftest intact.

the gap_r1r3 ratio secondaries remain in the pinned analysis's Holm family (conditional on the separation gate); adding members only makes the Holm correction on the three 'beats' secondaries STRICTER, never looser.

evidence.dry_plan_a100: 250 items, 3 seeds, single k=4, gold dropped, prm N=4: 19 cells; A100 estimate 0.38 h point / 0.76 h worst (2x overhead); $0.80 point / $1.60 worst at Modal list $2.10/h; all caps OK (usd_cap $60, Tier-1 $80, gpu_hours_cap 24 h).
evidence.gates: registry-check PASS; test_fixtures 49 OK; claims-check PASS; analysis selftest OK.
evidence.mock_smoke: poc/f2b/smoke/check_mock.py ALL CHECKS PASSED ($0, CPU): 7 arm levels x 14 records, all 50 frozen analysis output_fields resolve, separation+P10 gates PASS, best_k=4, gold-oracle field null, both safety bounds self-terminate.

incident: Two prior full-phase A10G launches of the pre-right-size design each ran ~3.5 h (too heavy). Correction 1 (seq 1) fixed the instrument defects (per-cell flush + safety bounds) but did NOT change the design magnitude. This correction implements the architecture-advisor RIGHT-SIZED design.
kill_criterion_status: kill (a)(b)(c) verbatim UNCHANGED; the gold-oracle diagnostic-ceiling sentence was removed (arm dropped). Separation gate, shuffled kill (>=30% recovered fraction), Holm family and verdict rules unchanged.
legitimacy: Lawful pre-registration correction, NOT a post-hoc amendment: f2b-replicate is absent from registry/gng0-signoff.json frozen_records and no results-log/f2b-replicate.jsonl exists (no run record was ever logged). The freeze was reset to DRAFT, right-sized, and re-frozen through prereg-freeze under the standard lints; the frozen record itself states this path.

root_cause_check.actual_heaviness: The magnitude was the driver: per_arm_items=1000 x seeds=5 x retry_sweep {1,2,4} (worst-case 2+3+5=10 attempt-passes per retry arm) x the full arm set INCLUDING the gold-oracle-retry arm, x the 500-item external d-ext slice run through every arm's own pipeline. The harness's own --dry-plan estimated ~3.26 h point / ~6.52 h worst on A10G for that design — the >3.5 h runs were inside plan, just too heavy for routine iteration.
root_cause_check.finding: NO. Inspected the runner cell driver (poc/f2b/runner/f2b_runner.py run_cells): every retry/verify arm (kernel-verify-retry, shuffled-kernel-verify-retry, gloss-self-verify-retry, and the now-dropped gold-oracle-retry) ran ONLY at R1 (SmolLM2-135M). R3 (SmolLM2-1.7B) was invoked ONLY for the single-pass model-alone baseline (k=0). There was NO 1.7B retry ladder anywhere in the superseded design either — so R3-retries were not the cause.
root_cause_check.question: Were the ~3.5 h marathons caused by a 1.7B (R3) retry ladder?

spend_note: this correction's validation spent $0 (mock + dry-plan, CPU/local; no GPU, no network billing). The full A100 run is NOT launched by this correction — it awaits the maintainer Tier-1 go.
